name: Corn, Tomato and Zucchini Salad
recipeIngredient: 8 small vine ripened tomatoes, seeded and cut into 1-inch chunks
1 small red onion, cut into 1/4-inch cubes
4 medium zucchini, seeded, cut into 3/4 inch thick half moons
1/2 cup pitted Kalamata olives, cut into slivers
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the kernels off the corn cobs and transfer to a large mixing bowl.
2. Add the tomatoes and red onion to the bowl with the corn.
3. In a separate small bowl, whisk together the olive oil, mustard, and white wine vinegar.
4. Season the dressing to taste with salt and pepper.
5. Pour the dressing over the vegetables and toss well to combine.
6. Cover and refrigerate to marinate overnight.
7. Just before serving, add the zucchini to the salad mixture and toss gently.
8. Arrange the salad on a platter lined with lettuce leaves.
9. Garnish with pitted Kalamata olives.
Yield: 8 servings
